_comment: Android App Links verification for VICINO. Hosted at https://vicinomarket.com/.well-known/assetlinks.json. If the APK is published with Play App Signing (default in Play Console), the SHA256 below MUST be the fingerprint from Play Console > App integrity > App signing key certificate, NOT the local upload keystore. If unsure, declare BOTH (upload + Play app signing) inside sha256_cert_fingerprints. autoVerify=true fails silently when this file is missing, redirects, or has the wrong fingerprint.
